title: Tangy Ladyfinger Trifle
description: A layered dessert featuring tangy Canadian whipped cream, savoiardi ladyfingers, and a bake of fresh berries.
instructions: Bake the tangy berry bake in a 9x9 inch baking dish for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Dip each ladyfinger into the Canadian whipped cream for 3-5 seconds on each side. They should be soft and pliable but not too wet.
In a large serving dish, create a layer of ladyfingers. You can trim them to fit the dish.
Spread half of the tangy berry bake over the ladyfingers.
Repeat the layers: ladyfingers, tangy berry bake, and whipped cream.
Dust the top with granulated sugar and sprinkle with fresh berries.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
